description: An Amazon EMR Notebook execution. A notebook execution is a specific instance that an Amazon EMR Notebook is run using the StartNotebookExecution action.

NotebookExecutionId.description: The unique identifier of the notebook execution.
NotebookExecutionId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier of the notebook execution.

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
